title: Speculation Eva Final out Winter 2015
wikitext:
[]: [Speculation] Eva Final out Winter 2015? Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 26, 2013 6:16 pm Minna no Eva Fan has a speculation page about Final being theatrically released Winter 2015. http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2391.html Too pressed for time to translate things in full, so Article summary follows: Article Summary wrote: On page 138 in last month's edition (July 2013) of the magazine Otona Famitsu , an article blurb about the 3.33 BD/DVD (as well as the success of 1.11 and 2.22) comments on Final getting a Winter 2015 release--along with trailer recording being a hot topic. Then page 139 of this month's Otona Famitsu (August 2013) has a chart of films planned to be released in 2015 which includes Final. Minna no Eva Fan mentions how this speculation meshes with the Internet, a Japanese Yahoo Answers page: Somebody asked if the 3.33 BD/DVD has bonus footage that includes the supposed release date, but the image found online (said preview/tel-op image is in the Minna no Eva Fan article) is obviously fake. Presently, Final's theatrical debut isn't fixed but it's good to think about. EDIT: There's another rumor mentioning a 2014 release according to Google search: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2325.html July 1st 2012 is when Q's release date was given, so maybe they'll be something similar this year for Final.

[]: Post by Monk Ed » Wed Jun 26, 2013 6:24 pm That would be perfect ! Oh man, I know this is gonna sound weird, but this is one of those things I had seriously worried ("worried") about, because it's important to me what time of year in which I see the movies. I have always seen them in summer or thereabouts. If the movie gets released in winter, then the BD will be out by summer! Wait, does Winter 2015 mean the end of 2015 or the beginning of 2015, like, January or February? Either way, the BD will be out in summer! WOO HOO! Winter would also be fitting for the theatrical release if Anno finally goes for that "ending in snow" like he supposedly wanted for the original .

[]: Post by The Killer of Heroes » Wed Jun 26, 2013 6:25 pm I almost hope Anno is specifically waiting for 2015 just for the novelty of it being THAT year.

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Wed Jun 26, 2013 6:43 pm Having Final come out in 2015 would be a great marketing decision. July 1st 2012 is when Q's release date was given, so maybe they'll be something similar this year for Final.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Jun 26, 2013 6:55 pm I doubt anything will happen July 1st this year because the 2012 announcement was an event well hyped before it actually happend. That was the big fancy Eva Extra 08 is being projected onto a wall thing, remember? We still have completely silence from official channels. My only hopes for this year is Anno drawing more festival lamps SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 26, 2013 7:23 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: because the 2012 announcement was an event well hyped before it actually happened.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Jun 26, 2013 7:42 pm I was hoping for some kind of announcement on July 1st as well, but if the Eva Extra 08 thing was as advertised as TMBounty_Hunter says it was, then I doubt anything will happen. As awesome as it would be to have the release date be a reference to an important date in the Eva-verse, I really don't want to wait another three years to see FINAL....

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Jun 26, 2013 7:48 pm I'm going into Evangelion 4.0 Hypersleep. I'm hopeful that the script for 4.0 is "finished" enough that they can now begin production but once they do Khara & Co go into lockdown mode. No news. No pics. No hints. No tweets. Nothing. Pure blackout. Not to be negative but I expect it'll be like that for at least the next year. Unless they pull a release date out of nowhere in the next week or two the rest of 2013 is going to be silent. But hey, maybe we'll be lucky & on New Year's 2014 they'll drop a huge announcement like they did when we entered 2012. Either way, I'll keep coming back to EvaGeeks daily (more or lesS) for the discussion but don't expect to hear of any official news for a while.

[]: Post by The Killer of Heroes » Wed Jun 26, 2013 8:14 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: Having Final come out in 2015 would be a great marketing decision.

[]: Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jun 26, 2013 8:23 pm Monk Ed wrote: Winter would also be fitting if Anno finally goes for that "ending in snow" like he supposedly wanted for the original .

[]: Post by Monk Ed » Wed Jun 26, 2013 8:34 pm kuribo-04 wrote: When did he say that?

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Jun 26, 2013 8:56 pm Monk Ed wrote: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Statements_by_Evangelion_Staff#Toshio_Okada:_Return_of_the_Otaking Snow battle etc

[]: Post by hui43210 » Wed Jun 26, 2013 9:30 pm NO! NO NO NO I DON"T WANNA WAIT THAT LONG! I'm still hoping 2014, heck by winter 2015 I'll be 26 and this whole thing started when I was 16 for crying out loud! I know the show takes place in 2015, but FINAL will be in 2029 anyways.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Jun 26, 2013 9:44 pm Eva battles in the snow.... would love!

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jun 26, 2013 9:44 pm If this is all good and true and stuff, It's nice to know that they're not trying to avoid the obvious with the meta release date.

[]: Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jun 26, 2013 9:44 pm Monk Ed wrote: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Statements_by_Evangelion_Staff#Toshio_Okada:_Return_of_the_Otaking

[]: Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Jun 26, 2013 10:07 pm Uhhh. That was an interview from 1996. Ultimately EoE's main battle was instead rotoscoped. I think if Anno really wanted a snow battle, he would have had one by now. Core-fallout battle however....

[]: Post by Monk Ed » Wed Jun 26, 2013 10:23 pm Whoever said it wasn't an interview from 1996, etc?

[]: Post by iihieiii » Wed Jun 26, 2013 10:24 pm Actually I did this a few days ago trying to "speculate" i release date: (btw facepalm anytime ;P) Considering that the time between Japanese releases were according to the text below...we have a Min/Max of 21/41 months intervals between the movies. So...we can make 4 estimated releases for 4.0 ;P ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Release Dates ------------------------------------------------ Japan 1.11 [September, 2007] ......... 21 months later ......... 2.22 [June, 2009] ......... 41 months ......... 3.33 [November, 2012] ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 4.0 Movie Possible Dates ------------------------------------------------ based on the last JAP movie 3.33 [November, 2012] * Sep/Oct 2013 * - ( 10/11 months) Considering the OVERTIME in 2.0 to 3.0 * August 2014 * --- ( 21 months) Minimum time between movies * June 2015 * ----- ( 31 months) Medium time between movies * April 2016 * ----- ( 41 months) Jez...2016 =/ ------------------------------------------------------------------------- So ...after " Minna no Eva Fan " news...i believe that will be around August 2014--June 2015 -------------------------------------------------------------------------

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Jun 26, 2013 10:32 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Ultimately EoE's main battle was instead rotoscoped.
